steps.expected: 200 sorted company-scoped account list; unauthenticated denied.
steps.observed: MOCK returned 15 accounts sorted by code; RIVAL returned 1 company-scoped account(s); unauthenticated call returned 403.

steps.expected: 200 hierarchical tree containing all company accounts.
steps.observed: Account tree returned 15 root node(s) covering 15 account ids, with valid parentId relationships.

assertions.title: Account tree type filter invalid-type contract

steps.action: Account tree type filter invalid-type contract
steps.expected: Valid type returns only requested AccountType and invalid type returns 400 with allowed values.
steps.observed: Valid filter status=200, only_assets=True; invalid type status=400, allowedValues=None, response={'traceId': 'fc3fa796-91bc-431f-82ed-f9d61b20be85', 'reason': "Invalid account type 'not-a-type'", 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/accounts/tree/not-a-type', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': "Invalid account type 'not-a-type'", 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T05:51:55.932507927'}.

assertions.issues: Valid filter status=200, only_assets=True; invalid type status=400, allowedValues=None, response={'traceId': 'fc3fa796-91bc-431f-82ed-f9d61b20be85', 'reason': "Invalid account type 'not-a-type'", 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/accounts/tree/not-a-type', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': "Invalid account type 'not-a-type'", 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T05:51:55.932507927'}.

steps.expected: Valid account create returns 200 with generated id/publicId and zero balance.
steps.observed: Created account id=17 code=UTA837115 with zero balance and non-null publicId.

steps.expected: Same-type parent create succeeds; different-type parent returns 400.
steps.observed: Child account under same-type parent returned 200 (child id=19); cross-type parent returned 400 with body={'traceId': '236318f7-b3bf-46e4-849a-40007a3d3ee5', 'reason': 'Child account must have same type as parent', 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/accounts', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'Child account must have same type as parent', 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T05:51:57.940068106'}.

steps.expected: Missing code/name/type returns 400 with field-level validation details.
steps.observed: Missing-field create returned 400 with field errors {'name': 'must not be blank', 'type': 'must not be null', 'code': 'must not be blank'}.

steps.expected: Duplicate company-scoped account code returns 409 conflict and creates no second account.
steps.observed: Duplicate code UTA837115 returned 409 with body={'traceId': '7a43e979-9699-4ce2-b5c7-ce13fab1e52d', 'reason': "Account code 'UTA837115' already exists for company MOCK", 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/accounts', 'code': 'BUS_002', 'message': "Account code 'UTA837115' already exists for company MOCK", 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T05:51:58.304369138'}.

steps.expected: GET default-accounts returns all six default-account slots.
steps.observed: Default accounts read returned {'inventoryAccountId': None, 'cogsAccountId': None, 'revenueAccountId': None, 'discountAccountId': None, 'fgDiscountAccountId': None, 'taxAccountId': None}.

steps.expected: Valid default-account update returns 200 and omitting fgDiscountAccountId resolves it to discountAccountId.
steps.observed: Valid default-account update returned status=200 payload={'inventoryAccountId': 5, 'cogsAccountId': 6, 'revenueAccountId': 7, 'discountAccountId': 11, 'fgDiscountAccountId': 11, 'taxAccountId': 9}.

steps.expected: Discount account accepts REVENUE or EXPENSE only, and explicit discount + fgDiscount must match.
steps.observed: Revenue discount account update returned 200; asset discount update returned 400; mismatched discount/fgDiscount returned 400.

steps.expected: Configuration health reports unhealthy when defaults are missing and healthy=true, issues=[] after wiring is complete.
steps.observed: Before wiring: healthy=False issues=[{'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'domain': 'DEFAULT_ACCOUNTS', 'reference': 'COMPANY_DEFAULTS', 'message': 'Missing default account IDs: defaultInventoryAccountId, defaultCogsAccountId, defaultRevenueAccountId, defaultDiscountAccountId, defaultTaxAccountId'}]; after wiring defaults: healthy=True issues=[].

assertions.title: Configuration health detects product account gaps

steps.action: Configuration health detects product account gaps
steps.expected: Finished-good valuation/revenue/tax gaps should emit FINISHED_GOOD_ACCOUNT issues; raw-material inventory gaps should emit RAW_MATERIAL_ACCOUNT issues; missing GST accounts should emit TAX_ACCOUNT issues.
steps.observed: After nulling FG-GST valuation_account_id, configuration health still returned healthy=True with issues=[]; nulling RM-RESIN inventory_account_id returned healthy=False with RAW_MATERIAL_ACCOUNT; nulling MOCK gst_output_tax_account_id returned healthy=False with TAX_ACCOUNT.

assertions.issues: After nulling FG-GST valuation_account_id, configuration health still returned healthy=True with issues=[]; nulling RM-RESIN inventory_account_id returned healthy=False with RAW_MATERIAL_ACCOUNT; nulling MOCK gst_output_tax_account_id returned healthy=False with TAX_ACCOUNT.

steps.expected: Journal-entry list supports pagination plus dealerId/supplierId/source filters.
steps.observed: Pagination returned 5 items; dealerId=3 returned 5 dealer rows; supplierId=1 returned 2 supplier rows; source=PURCHASING returned 1 row(s).

steps.expected: Journals list respects date range, journal type, sourceModule, page, and size filters.
steps.observed: Automated/date-range journals returned 13; sourceModule=PURCHASING returned 1.

assertions.title: Manual journal posting balanced lines

steps.expected: Balanced manual journal posts successfully with MANUAL- reference number and equal debits/credits.
steps.observed: Balanced manual journal posting returned status=200 but the server ignored the requested MANUAL- reference namespace and emitted referenceNumber=JRN-MOCK-202604-0001 while keeping debits/credits balanced.

assertions.issues: Balanced manual journal posting returned status=200 but the server ignored the requested MANUAL- reference namespace and emitted referenceNumber=JRN-MOCK-202604-0001 while keeping debits/credits balanced.

steps.expected: Blank or missing memo is rejected with a validation error.
steps.observed: Blank memo returned status=400, body={'traceId': 'ecc36621-541b-42ea-ab55-b00420281673', 'reason': 'Manual journal reason is required', 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/journal-entries', 'code': 'VAL_002', 'message': 'Manual journal reason is required', 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T05:52:05.283259596'}.

steps.expected: Unbalanced manual journal returns 400.
steps.observed: Unbalanced manual journal returned status=400, body={'traceId': '0052e08c-25a0-4bdb-b7c1-16420aeae054', 'reason': 'Journal entry must balance', 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/journal-entries', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'Journal entry must balance', 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T05:52:05.541582142'}.

steps.expected: System-reserved references are rejected, but MANUAL- is allowed.
steps.observed: Reserved prefix status=400, reserved -INV- pattern status=400, MANUAL- prefix status=200.

assertions.title: Manual journal idempotency

steps.expected: Same reference with same payload replays the existing journal, while a materially different replay of that reference returns 400.
steps.observed: A MANUAL-REPLAY probe returned 200/200/200 for first/same/changed payloads; both replays returned the original journal id=36 with unchanged memo/line amounts instead of rejecting the materially different payload.

assertions.issues: A MANUAL-REPLAY probe returned 200/200/200 for first/same/changed payloads; both replays returned the original journal id=36 with unchanged memo/line amounts instead of rejecting the materially different payload.

steps.expected: Missing accountId, negative amounts, zero-only lines, and both-debit-and-credit lines are rejected with 400.
steps.observed: Invalid line cases returned ['missing accountId:400', 'negative amount:400', 'zero line:400', 'both debit/credit:400'].

assertions.title: Journal reversal — full reversal in open period

steps.action: Journal reversal — full reversal in open period
steps.expected: Open-period reversal returns 200 with flipped debit/credit lines and marks the original REVERSED.
steps.observed: Entry 22 reversed with status=200 into entry 23; DB status for the original became REVERSED and the reversal lines flipped 300.00 debit/credit exactly.

steps.expected: voidOnly=true returns 200, marks the original VOIDED, and posts a counter-entry with flipped lines and VOID metadata.
steps.observed: Entry 24 reversed with status=200 into entry 25; DB status for the original became VOIDED and the counter-entry carried correctionType=VOID with flipped 310.00 lines.

steps.expected: reversalPercentage=50.00 returns 200 with reversal lines at exactly 50% of the original amounts.
steps.observed: Entry 26 reversed with status=200 into entry 27; the reversal summed to debit=500.00 credit=500.00 for the original 1000.00/1000.00 journal.

assertions.title: Journal reversal — blocked for locked period

steps.action: Journal reversal — blocked for locked period
steps.expected: Reversing an entry whose accounting period is LOCKED returns 400 and leaves the original unchanged.
steps.observed: A March journal posted with adminOverride was then placed in LOCKED period 2; reversing entry 29 returned 400 "Cannot reverse entry from LOCKED period 2026-3" and the original remained POSTED.

assertions.title: Journal reversal — closed period requires admin override

steps.action: Journal reversal — closed period requires admin override
steps.expected: Reversing in a CLOSED period returns 400 without adminOverride and succeeds with an override plus audit metadata.
steps.observed: Entry 30 in CLOSED March period returned 400 without override, then 200 with adminOverride=true into entry 31; audit_action_events recorded JOURNAL_REVERSAL_ADMIN_OVERRIDE metadata including adminOverrideAuthorized=true and the before/after states.

assertions.title: Journal reversal — already reversed or voided

steps.action: Journal reversal — already reversed or voided
steps.expected: Reversing an already REVERSED entry returns 400 and reversing a VOIDED entry returns 400.
steps.observed: Reversing entry 22 again returned 400 "Entry has already been reversed"; reversing entry 24 again returned 400 "Entry is already voided".

steps.expected: GST-mode company returns document-backed GST totals and future periods are rejected; journal-only GST entries without source docs do not alter totals.
steps.observed: January GST return before/after journal-only GST entry was {'period': '2026-01', 'periodStart': '2026-01-01', 'periodEnd': '2026-01-31', 'outputTax': 180.0, 'inputTax': 0.0, 'netPayable': 180.0} / {'period': '2026-01', 'periodStart': '2026-01-01', 'periodEnd': '2026-01-31', 'outputTax': 180.0, 'inputTax': 0.0, 'netPayable': 180.0}; future-period status=400.

steps.expected: Non-GST company returns zeros when clean and 400 if GST accounts are configured.
steps.observed: Non-GST RIVAL return before GST accounts was {'period': '2026-04', 'periodStart': '2026-04-01', 'periodEnd': '2026-04-30', 'outputTax': 0, 'inputTax': 0, 'netPayable': 0.0}; after configuring GST accounts status=400, body={'traceId': '298093b6-5b9b-4046-aabf-bbccab5babd1', 'reason': 'Non-GST mode company cannot have GST tax accounts configured', 'path': '/api/v1/accounting/gst/return', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'Non-GST mode company cannot have GST tax accounts configured', 'timestamp': '2026-04-22T05:52:14.506723455'}.

steps.expected: GST reconciliation exposes collected/input/net components and excludes journal-only GST entries without source docs for persisted-company truth.
steps.observed: January GST reconciliation before/after journal-only GST entry was {'period': '2026-01', 'periodStart': '2026-01-01', 'periodEnd': '2026-01-31', 'collected': {'cgst': 90.0, 'sgst': 90.0, 'igst': 0.0, 'total': 180.0}, 'inputTaxCredit': {'cgst': 0.0, 'sgst': 0.0, 'igst': 0.0, 'total': 0.0}, 'netLiability': {'cgst': 90.0, 'sgst': 90.0, 'igst': 0.0, 'total': 180.0}} / {'period': '2026-01', 'periodStart': '2026-01-01', 'periodEnd': '2026-01-31', 'collected': {'cgst': 90.0, 'sgst': 90.0, 'igst': 0.0, 'total': 180.0}, 'inputTaxCredit': {'cgst': 0.0, 'sgst': 0.0, 'igst': 0.0, 'total': 0.0}, 'netLiability': {'cgst': 90.0, 'sgst': 90.0, 'igst': 0.0, 'total': 180.0}}; report summary={'cgst': 90.0, 'sgst': 90.0, 'igst': 0.0, 'total': 180.0}.

steps.expected: Date context exposes companyId/companyCode/timezone/today/now and today matches company timezone.
steps.observed: Date context returned {'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'companyId': 1, 'timezone': 'UTC', 'today': '2026-04-22', 'now': '2026-04-22T05:52:07.484970113Z'}.

steps.expected: Balance as-of returns numeric value for valid date and 400 for invalid date.
steps.observed: Valid as-of status=200 value=254.45; invalid-date status=400.

steps.expected: Balance compare returns from/to/change and 400 when dates are missing.
steps.observed: Compare status=200, payload={'from': '2026-04-01', 'fromBalance': 0, 'to': '2026-04-30', 'toBalance': 254.45, 'change': 254.45}; missing-date status=400.

steps.expected: Account activity returns opening/closing/netMovement with closing = opening + netMovement, and missing dates return 400.
steps.observed: Activity status=200, opening=0, net=254.45, closing=254.45; missing-date status=400.

steps.expected: Trial balance is balanced and missing date returns 400.
steps.observed: Trial balance totals debits=9471.95 credits=9471.95; missing-date status=400.

assertions.title: Audit trail transaction list and detail

steps.action: Audit trail transaction list and detail
steps.expected: Audit list/detail endpoints return 200 for admin/accounting, 403 outside policy, and 404 for missing journal ids.
steps.observed: GET /audit/transactions returned 200 for admin and accounting, 403 for sales; detail for journal 34 returned 200 with eventTrail and linkedReferenceChain; journal 99999999 returned 404.

assertions.title: Authorization enforced on GL core endpoints

steps.action: Authorization enforced on GL core endpoints
steps.expected: Core accounting endpoints deny unauthenticated/insufficient-role callers while admin/accounting access succeeds.
steps.observed: GET /api/v1/accounting/accounts returned 403 unauthenticated, 200 for ROLE_ACCOUNTING, and 403 for ROLE_SALES; audit list remained 200 for admin and 403 for sales.

assertions.title: Journal reversal rejects unsupported cascade options

steps.action: Journal reversal rejects unsupported cascade options
steps.expected: cascadeRelatedEntries=true or relatedEntryIds should return 400 and create no reversal rows.
steps.observed: Reversing entry 32 with cascadeRelatedEntries=true and relatedEntryIds=[22] returned 400 "Cascade reversal is not supported; reverse each related entry individually" and journal_entries contained zero rows with reversal_of_id=32.

steps.expected: voidOnly=true with reversalPercentage<100 returns 400.
steps.observed: Reversing entry 33 with voidOnly=true and reversalPercentage=50.0 returned 400 "voidOnly reversal cannot use reversalPercentage less than 100".

assertions.title: Trial balance reflects all posted journals across modules

steps.action: Trial balance reflects all posted journals across modules
steps.expected: Trial balance remains balanced and includes posted journal truth from all contributing modules.
steps.observed: Trial balance as of 2026-04-30 returned totalDebits=9227.5 and totalCredits=9227.5; April journal source_module counts were MANUAL=10, NULL=19, and PURCHASING=1, confirming cross-module posting contributions.

assertions.title: GST surfaces agree on document-backed tax truth

steps.action: GST surfaces agree on document-backed tax truth
steps.expected: GST return, reconciliation, and report endpoints should agree on document-backed tax truth, and a journal-only GST entry without source documents must not change canonical January totals.
steps.observed: After posting January journal 35 under adminOverride between GST-IN and GST-OUT, /accounting/gst/return, /accounting/gst/reconciliation, and /reports/gst-return?periodId=4 all remained at 180.0 total tax/net liability with one rateSummary and one transactionDetail.

assertions.title: Posted journal in closed/locked period cannot be reversed without reopen

steps.action: Posted journal in closed/locked period cannot be reversed without reopen
steps.expected: Locked and closed periods should block reversal without the required lifecycle state/override, while supported reversal paths remain balanced.
steps.observed: Live API/DB probes covered open reversal, void-only, partial reversal, locked-period rejection, closed-period rejection without override, closed-period override with audit record, duplicate reversal rejection, cascade rejection, and partial-void rejection; all observed behaviors matched the contract.

frictions.description: The delegated user-testing-flow-validator Task helper exited without producing a report.
frictions.resolution: Validation fell back to direct in-session API/DB verification on the seeded compose runtime.

summary: Completed seeded API/DB validation for 41 assertions (40 fulfill-derived plus adjacent auth probe VAL-GL-034). Four fulfill-derived contract mismatches remain: VAL-GL-003, VAL-GL-011, VAL-GL-014, and VAL-GL-017.
